original text:
Added by Peter Amstutz almost 2 years ago.
Updated about 1 year ago.
The left column of the dashboard used to have two panels, one for "running" processes and one for "recently completed" process.
However, as part of the "work unit" changes, this was turned into a single "recent pipelines and processes" panel.
Unfortunately, a long running (but not yet completed) process can get pushed off the bottom if other smaller processes complete in the mean time.
I consider this a regression.
It should prioritize for display tasks which are still running.
The original change described in this ticket sounds like a regression.
What story was that associated with?

original text:
Lizz Winstead - the TV producer, stand-up comic, and writer who co-created Comedy Central's The Daily Show, and whose comic sensibilities defined it in its early, pre-Jon Stewart years - has announced that she'll be broadcasting an end-of-year satirical wrap-up on December 31.
Titled Controversy, in honor of the late Prince, the pay-per-view special will cover the entire national garbage fire that was 2016.
"I have been doing political comedy for 25 years and this year was the biggest avalanche of material I have ever had to dig out from under," Winstead said in a press release describing the show.
The comic's credits include both Comedy Central and MSNBC; she's also the author of an essay collection, Lizz Free Or Die, and has hosted a weekly live satire show, Don't Shoot The Messenger, in New York since 2007.
Winstead will be filming the special on December 30, ensuring that no last-minute tragedies or low-key awfulness manage to slip through the cracks.
You should be able to pre-order the special at this link soon, via a $9.99 donation to Winstead's Lady Parts Justice League, a non-profit organization that raises awareness about legislation impacting women's reproductive rights.

original text:
Employees of the Department of Education (DOE) or University of Hawai'i (UH), may also have the option, in addition to the Island $avings Plan, of participating in the IRC 403(b) Tax Deferred Annuity Plan (TDA).
Similar to the Island $avings Plan, contributions are made before taxes through payroll deductions and provide supplemental income to regular retirement benefits.
UH employees: Call OHR/Employee Relations Section at 956-8643.

employees: Call OHR/Employee Relations Section 956-8643.

original text:
Held between 22 and 25 March, the annual Van der Valk Experience Event was a great success.
Our state-of-the-art yachtbuilding facilities in Waalwijk (NL) welcomed hundreds of guests and visitors over the four days, beating the record numbers seen last year.
Many people said how impressed they were with our brand-new 42-metre construction hall, which was looking great for the occasion.
There was good food and music for all, while a number of new and potential clients took the chance to have personal meetings with designers Guido de Groot and Cor de Rover and naval architect Jaron Ginton to explore possible future builds.
However, as is always the case at the Experience Event, the true stars were undoubtedly the various yachts we had on display.
Visitors clearly enjoyed having the chance to see at first hand no less than nine Van der Valk boars at various stages of construction.
Highlights included a brand new 32-metre Raised Pilothouse as well as the first two hulls in our innovative new BeachClub line.
The BeachClub boats offer an unprecedented amount of space indoors and out, and are sure to make a great impression at next years' Experience Event when completed.
We look forward to seeing you there!

original text:
Core Security Systems Ltd has over 25 years experience within the integrated systems field specialising in on-line computerised access control systems, closed circuit television systems, remotely monitored intruder alarm systems, advanced addressable fire alarm systems and entrance controls.
Our business is protecting people, your property.
Effectively we control access for your staff and visitors around your facility is a major element in an integrated security policy.
Offering a variety of systems from small stand alone access systems or medium to large scale fully integrated systems.
Whether domestic, retail or commercial we can offer a bespoke service to suit your property and budget.
With a huge wealth of experience in installing and servicing all major brands such as Honeywell Galaxy and Texecom systems.
Core Security Systems Limited have a huge amount of experience working with installing and maintaining major brands such as Avigilon, Honeywell, Pelco, Cathexis, Axis, HIKVISION, Panasonic systems as well as many other systems.
We use industry leading equipment with an excellent installation processes.
Core Security Systems Limited have a huge amount of experience working with installing and maintaining major brands such as Gunnebo, Boon Edam FAST LANE, Came as well as many others.
Core Security Systems Limited have a huge amount of experience working with installing and maintaining major brands such as Gent, Morley, Apollo, Kentec and Xtralis Air Aspirating Systems.
Over the years we have built up a great reputation, therefore a large percentage of our work comes from word of mouth recommendation and repeat business, our services covers design, installation and faultless after care service, feel free to contact us for quotes and advice.
I would like to personally thank you for your outstanding product.
The new security system for our premesis has been reliable, smart and great value for money.
We are very pleased to continue building a strong business relationship.
Have a review you would like to share with us?
With offices located in Upminster Essex, we are within easy reach of the City of London and home counties.
We have technicians and engineers placed to service London and the M25 suburbs and offer national and international support for our corporate clients.
We continue to strive in delivering truly professional ethics ensuring we provide our customer with the most advanced, high quality products such as smart proximity access control and digital storage CCTV systems at a cost they can appreciate.
Use our Quick Contact form.

The hand-winder Best Panerai Radiomir Oro Rosso Replica Watch PAM 439 is a screw turn, and the bezel completes the all-round beauty of this watch's casing, shining too in polished red gold.
For the base of this watch's casing, the manufacturer has chosen transparent sapphire glass, which has also been used for the watch glass.
The PANERAI Radiomir Oro Rosso PAM 439 is waterproof up to 10 bar (100 metres).
Hours, minutes and small second - this watch doesn't need anything more.
This watch works as pure aesthetic harmony.
With a diameter of 42 mm, the casing has been made from milled, polished 18K red gold.
This Panerai Radiomir Replica Watch model also comes with integrated removable wire loop strap attachments.
Powering the PANERAI Radiomir Oro Rosso PAM 439 is a mechanical mechanism with manual winding, calibre P.999, which is composed of 154 elements, created entirely by this Italian manufacturer.
This model is remarkable for the power reserve 60 hours and the swan's neck regulator, among other features.
The brown dial fits perfectly with the red gold of the casing, leaving the Arabic numerals and hour markings easily readable.
Just as with many other Radiomir models, the second display is positioned at 9 o'clock.
The wrist strap is made of brown alligator-leather, with the buckle finished in polished red gold.
This splendid time keeper is definitely not one to be missed; as with all specialties, there are only a limited number in existence.
When it comes to the functions, this Panerai Replica Watch is focused on the truly essential.
The exact time is immediately recognisable, fitting perfectly with this watch's aesthetic harmony.
